title: WOS API Case Export Fence
description: Public API resource schema for the WOS-side source fence returned by `GET /api/v1/cases/{case_id}/export-fence` (ADR-0093 D-1; `specs/api/case-export-fence.md`). Captures case-ledger append-vector high-water marks and the active policy-snapshot digest at fence-acquisition time under `LeaseScope::WosCaseSource`. Downstream Trellis publication binds `trellis-export-seal-fence-v1` to these values. Sibling of `case-view.schema.json` — same ledger authority, export-time snapshot semantics rather than staff read projection.

WosResourceUrn.description: Public WOS API resource URN (ADR 0082 D-4).

Sha256PrefixedDigest.description: Lowercase SHA-256 digest with `sha256:` prefix per `stack-common-hash` canonical JSON hashing.

PolicySnapshotSourceKind.description: Closed policy-material family emitted by the reference server's fence builder. New kinds require a schema minor bump — vendor extensions belong on bundle manifests, not the source fence.

PolicySnapshotVersionBinding.description: Closed version-binding literal describing how `sourceRef` is interpreted when recomputing digests.

PolicySnapshotSource.description: Canonically hashed policy/config source included in the case export fence.

sourceRef.description: Stable reference to the hashed material (process URN, workflow URL@version, or deployment-scoped fragment ref).

versionBinding.description: How `sourceRef` is bound when recomputing the per-source digest.

digest.description: Canonical JSON hash of the source material at fence acquisition.

CaseFenceEvent.description: High-water event marker used by the case export fence.

eventId.description: Storage-local provenance row identifier for the high-water event.

processId.description: Emitting workflow process URN when the high-water event is process-scoped. Absent for direct-append high-water markers.

sequence.description: Monotonic sequence number within the emitting partition at fence acquisition.

timestamp.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when the row was appended.

ProcessFenceHighWater.description: Per-process high-water marker for the case export fence.

processId.description: Workflow process URN bound to the case ledger.

definitionUrl.description: Workflow definition URL the process instance was started from.

definitionVersion.description: Pinned workflow definition version at fence acquisition.

status.description: Workflow process lifecycle status at fence acquisition.

eventCount.description: Count of provenance events emitted by this process at fence acquisition.

latestEvent.description: Last process-emitted event observed at fence acquisition. Absent when the process has no events.

CaseExportFence.description: WOS-side source fence for a case-export attempt. Captures the current case-ledger and policy/config high-water marks before downstream bundle assembly.

caseLedgerId.description: Durable governed case-ledger URN whose append vector this fence captures.

trellisScope.description: Trellis scope identifier for the case ledger's bundle scope (string-encoded scope bytes).

eventCount.description: Total merged event count at fence acquisition. Verifiers MUST observe the same count in the bundle event stream.

eventHighWater.description: Last event in the merged case stream at fence acquisition. Absent when the case has no events.

directHighWater.description: Last direct-append event at fence acquisition. Absent when the case has no direct-append rows.

processHighWater.description: Per-process high-water cursor for every workflow process bound to the case. Empty when no processes exist.

policySnapshotDigest.description: Canonical digest of `{ caseLedgerId, policySources }` at fence acquisition.

policySources.description: Provenance for policy materials that contributed to `policySnapshotDigest`.

capturedAt.description: Server clock at fence acquisition (RFC 3339 UTC).
